titleStmt.title: SII 23.107: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 107. (A.R. No. 107 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This belongs to the 20+1+1st year of Māṟavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya (I) (acc. A.D. 1216) ‘who was pleased to perform the anointment of heroes at Mudigoṇḍaśoḻapuram after having taken the Chōḷa country’. It records a gift of an achchu and quarter to the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagar-Emberumān by Irāśipuṟam Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ a resident of the 4th chēri in Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi for meeting, with the interest on the amount, the expenses of offerings and worship to the deity on the day of a special festival in the month of Āḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa
coḻapurattu virar Abhiṣekam paṇṇiaruḷiya śrī cun=tarapāṇṭiyatevaṟki yāṇṭu 2 10
tāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājacaturvedimamga
lattu teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikuṟicci nālāyiraviṇṇakar remperumā ṉukku nālāñceri Irāci
puṟattu karumāṇikkāḷvāṉeṉ Āṭiamāvāsikkiṭṭa Accu kava kālum Āṭiy Amaāvāsikku Iṭṭa Accu kava
poliyūṭṭu koṇṭu viti puṟappaṭṭaruḷi tirumañcaṉam cey taruḷi tiruvārikoṇṭaruḷukaikku Aṟunāḻikālāl Araci
cipaṇṭāra kāllā kalaṉṉe kuṟuṇiy Arici cantirātival celva tāṉamaikkum neyyamutu nāḻiyum
tayiramutum kaṟiyamutum Iḷu ḷatu cantiṟātical celvatāṉamaikku .
Digital edition of SII 23.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
